scripts.build:slime: cd slime-calculator && mkdir -p build && gcc -o build/slime_cmp slime_cmp.c -lm -O3 && { which nvcc >/dev/null 2>&1 && nvcc -o build/slime_main slime_main.cu -O3 -use_fast_math -arch=native && nvcc -o build/slime_circle slime_circle.cu -O3 -use_fast_math -arch=native; } || echo '⚠️ nvcc 未安装，跳过 CUDA 编译'
